title: Switch to Dark theme and verify immediate UI update
description: Verifies that selecting Dark theme updates visible UI styling immediately on the showcase page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify element "Theme toggle" is visible in the header
Click the theme toggle control in the header
Click on "Dark" in the theme options
Verify text "Dark" is visible as the active/selected theme
Verify element "Toast" (or a visible component example card/button) is visible

title: Switch to Light theme and verify immediate UI update
description: Verifies that selecting Light theme updates visible UI styling immediately on the showcase page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the theme toggle control in the header
Click on "Light" in the theme options
Verify text "Light" is visible as the active/selected theme
Verify element "Theme toggle" is visible in the header
Verify element "Component" examples section is visible

title: Switch to System theme and verify it is selected
description: Verifies that selecting System mode is reflected as the active theme selection in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the theme toggle control in the header
Click on "System" in the theme options
Verify text "System" is visible as the active/selected theme
Verify element "Theme toggle" is visible in the header
Verify element "Showcase" content area is visible

title: Persist selected theme after page refresh (Dark)
description: Verifies that a chosen theme (Dark) persists after a browser refresh when persistence is available.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the theme toggle control in the header
Click on "Dark" in the theme options
Verify text "Dark" is visible as the active/selected theme
Refresh the page
Verify text "Dark" is visible as the active/selected theme

title: Persist selected theme after page refresh (Light)
description: Verifies that a chosen theme (Light) persists after a browser refresh when persistence is available.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the theme toggle control in the header
Click on "Light" in the theme options
Verify text "Light" is visible as the active/selected theme
Refresh the page
Verify text "Light" is visible as the active/selected theme

title: Theme toggle options open and close behavior
description: Verifies that the theme menu can be opened and dismissed without changing selection unexpectedly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the theme toggle control in the header
Verify text "Light" is visible in the theme options
Press Escape
Verify element "Theme options" is not visible
Verify element "Theme toggle" is visible in the header

title: Switch themes repeatedly and verify the last selection is reflected
description: Verifies that multiple theme changes in one session result in the final selected theme being shown as active.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the theme toggle control in the header
Click on "Dark" in the theme options
Click the theme toggle control in the header
Click on "Light" in the theme options
Verify text "Light" is visible as the active/selected theme

title: Explore component gallery and confirm key sections render
description: Verifies the main showcase loads and users can scroll to see component sections and example areas.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify page title contains "Saha"
Scroll to the middle of the page
Verify text "Components" is visible
Scroll to the bottom of the page
Verify text "Toast" is visible

title: Button interaction shows visible state change or feedback
description: Verifies that clicking a button example produces visible feedback (state change, message, or UI reaction).

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the section that contains button examples
Verify text "Button" is visible
Click on the primary button example
Verify text "Clicked" is visible
Click on the same primary button example again
Verify element "Toast" is visible

title: Text input accepts typing and reflects typed value
description: Verifies an input example accepts user text and shows the updated value in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the section that contains input examples
Verify text "Input" is visible
Click on the text input field in the input example
Type "Hello Saha" into the text input field
Verify text "Hello Saha" is visible

title: Dialog opens and closes via close control
description: Verifies dialog example opens from its trigger and can be closed to return to the underlying page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the section that contains dialog examples
Verify text "Dialog" is visible
Click on the dialog trigger button (for example, "Open" or "Open Dialog")
Verify text "Dialog" is visible
Click on the dialog close button (for example, "Close" or an "X" icon)
Verify element "Dialog content" is not visible

title: Dropdown/select opens and allows selecting an option
description: Verifies a select/dropdown example opens and selecting an option results in visible selection feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the section that contains select or dropdown examples
Verify text "Select" is visible
Click on the select control to open the dropdown
Verify text "Choose" is visible
Click on a visible option in the dropdown list
Verify the selected option text is visible

title: Theme switching updates visible theme indicator
description: Verifies users can toggle theme and see a visible change or indicator reflecting the current theme.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify text "Theme" is visible
Click on the theme toggle control
Verify text "Dark" is visible
Click on the theme toggle control again
Verify text "Light" is visible

title: Toast notification appears and then dismisses
description: Verifies toast example can be triggered and becomes visible to the user, then is dismissed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the section that contains toast examples
Verify text "Toast" is visible
Click on the button that triggers a toast (for example, "Show toast")
Verify text "Toast" is visible
Wait for 3 seconds
Verify element "Toast" is not visible

title: Negative: Ensure no console-only debugging flow is required
description: Validates the demo gallery does not require console access for normal interaction and no error state blocks the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the middle of the page
Click on a representative interactive example control (for example, a button trigger)
Verify text "Error" is not visible
Scroll to the bottom of the page
Verify text "Toast" is visible

title: Toast appears after triggering a toast example
description: Verifies that triggering a toast example renders a visible toast notification on the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify text "Toast" is visible
Click on the toast trigger control in the Toast example section
Verify element "toast notification" is visible
Verify text "success" is visible

title: Toast is positioned on-screen and not clipped
description: Verifies the toast renders fully within the viewport at its configured position (e.g., corner) and is readable.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click on the toast trigger control in the Toast example section
Verify element "toast notification" is visible
Verify element "toast container" is visible
Verify text "Toast" is visible

title: Toast shows an animation state on appearance
description: Verifies that a toast visually transitions in (animation) rather than appearing as static content only.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click on the toast trigger control in the Toast example section
Verify element "toast notification" is visible
Verify text "Animating" is visible

title: Multiple toasts can be triggered sequentially
description: Verifies triggering the toast multiple times results in multiple toast instances or updated toast behavior without breaking the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click on the toast trigger control in the Toast example section
Verify element "toast notification" is visible
Click on the toast trigger control in the Toast example section
Verify element "toast notification" is visible

title: Toast remains visible while interacting elsewhere on the page
description: Verifies the toast is not immediately dismissed or blocked when the user scrolls the showcase content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click on the toast trigger control in the Toast example section
Verify element "toast notification" is visible
Scroll to the bottom of the page
Verify element "toast notification" is visible

title: Toast provider presence is reflected by toast rendering (provider mounted)
description: Verifies that the ToastProvider is effectively mounted by confirming a toast can render globally on the page when triggered.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify text "ToastProvider" is visible
Click on the toast trigger control in the Toast example section
Verify element "toast notification" is visible

title: Negative check: no-toast scenario is not applicable in the demo (skip console validation)
description: Validates that the demo does not support console-based provider-missing verification; focuses on UI-only confirmation instead.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify text "Toast" is visible
Click on the toast trigger control in the Toast example section
Verify element "toast notification" is visible
